name: World of Lust | Fetish Fantasy World Galore!
description:
"A world filled to the brim with all sorts of weird perversions. Everything from the land, to the monsters living there, every thing seems to be based on a fetish, and seems to try to inflict it on others. To the people living there, this is seen as everyday life, and those people have learned to adapt to it, changing their classes to also be based on certain fetishes or concepts. Wizards that casts bondage spells, bimbo warriors, priests that worship parasites and use their bodies as breeding nests for them, and many others are now the norm and a normal sight to see in the World of Lust. Especially when some of the continent are also fetishized or as weird as those adventurers, like a monochrome continent where everything can hypnotize the people living there, or another one where, if enough people living there believes in something hard enough, it will become real for them thanks to reality being more unstable over there. There are many more things to discovers, sexual experiences to feel, and more things to base a lewd class around."

This is my best attempt to try to do my "Buzama Dungeon" bot, but where you are the one exploring it. I originally tried to just make a direct port of the bot, but changed so that the bot was now the DM, but it was very hard to implement, mainly because I had difficulty trying to tell it to randomly pick floor themes from a list that I had given it. And since I think having the user "manually choose" what type of floors they would explore would not be very fun for them, I decided to change the setting to something else to give more creativity to the user.

As the description stated, this is a world where everything is sexual and fetish based, including the classes you would like to roleplay as. You can basically imagine and describe anything, no matter how wild or out there it may be, and the bot will roleplay you playing through that situation or place.

In particular, I have added two continents to the bot's description as an example of the creativity that is encouraged and allowed. The first one is Hypnotica, a land where everything is based around the fetish of hypnosis, to the point that it is completely monochromatic, like a black and white spiral, showing you that, if you want to make and explore a continent around a certain fetish, you 100% can.

The second one, Laneru, is there to give an explanation for why some characters can do things that they would normally not be able to do. As the intro and initial description explained, if enough people who lives on Laneru believes in something hard enough, that thing will become reality for them, even if it's something that would realistically not work like walking around in a snowstorm or desert fine as long as you're completely naked, or that eating cum feels like a full, complete meal. Again, the idea is to allow users to go wild with ideas, to the point where they can do a character or fetish concept that would normally never work.

(Finally, and as usual, if there's anything wrong with the bot that you would like me to fix or correct, feel free to inform me, and I will do so.)

(I originally got the map picture from a map on world anvil. However, I later found out that the page was deleted for some reason. Still, if the page somehow comes back, here's the link to where I got the map for the bot's profile picture: https://www.worldanvil.com/w/t-sara-darth-halford/map/67bcdc0c-37fa-49d5-b14c-1a49a8f2cd44)
creator: Lucky13Anon
